title: RISM announces scholarship for top 20% students across its five courses
description: New Delhi [India], July 13: Ramaiah Institute of Science and Management (RISM), an internationally linked and industry-aligned institution, announces scholarship for top 20% students across its courses in B.Tech in Computer Science & Artificial Intelligence (60 seats), B.Tech in Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design and Technologies) (60 seats), B.Tech in Electronics & Computer Engineering (60 seats), B.Tech in Aerospace Engineering (60 seats) and Bachelor of Business Administration (60 seats). Eligible students in each program are entitled to an 80% scholarship on the applicable tuition fee.

title: The importance of human review in AI-driven physicians' documentation
description: Artificial intelligence in clinical settings is becoming more common. AI speech-to-text had a moment in the spotlight on the medical drama series "The Pitt" earlier this year. "Studies show that you can spend 80% less time charting," says character Baran Al-Hashimi, a doctor showing her peers a new AI speech-to-text tool. But a skeptical colleague raised concerns after the tool misheard the name of a patient's medication.

title: Massive AI buildout poses latest inflation threat as consumers pay more
description: The gusher of investment in data centers — likely topping $700 billion this year — to power artificial intelligence has made memory chips, computer processors and other equipment, as well as electricity, more expensive.
content:

description: Artificial intelligence is reshaping business decision-making and leadership expectations. Leaders must now embrace AI fluency to guide teams and align investments.
